name: Test Coverage Analysis
description: Run tests with coverage and identify gaps

input.command: [ -f package.json ] && echo 'node' || ([ -f pyproject.toml ] || [ -f setup.py ] || [ -f requirements.txt ]) && echo 'python' || echo 'unknown'

if [ -f package.json ]; then npx jest --coverage --coverageReporters=text 2>&1 | tail -40; elif [ -f pyproject.toml ] || [ -f setup.py ]; then python3 -m pytest --cov=. --cov-report=term-missing 2>&1 | tail -40; else echo 'No test framework detected'; fi

if [ -f package.json ]; then find src -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.js' 2>/dev/null | while read f; do base=$(basename "$f" | sed 's/\.[^.]*$//'); find . -path '*/test*' -name "*${base}*" 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || echo "No test: $f"; done | head -15; else find . -name '*.py' -not -path '*/test*' -not -name '__*' -maxdepth 3 2>/dev/null | while read f; do base=$(basename "$f" .py); find . -path '*/test*' -name "*${base}*" 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || echo "No test: $f"; done | head -15; fi
